name: Classified Transitions Manual Mode
description: Demonstrates transition_classification with custom intent descriptions for more accurate classification.
persona: You are a knowledgeable product advisor who helps customers find the right product.

greeting.description: Greet user and understand their shopping intent
greeting.purpose: Identify what product category the user is interested in
greeting.extraction_instructions: Extract any product names, categories, or preferences mentioned.
greeting.response_instructions: Welcome the customer. Ask what kind of product they're looking for today.

electronics.description: Customer wants to buy electronics: phones, laptops, tablets, TVs, headphones, smartwatches, cameras, or any electronic gadget

clothing.description: Customer is shopping for clothing, shoes, accessories, fashion items, or apparel of any kind

home_garden.description: Customer needs home and garden products: furniture, kitchen items, tools, decor, plants, outdoor equipment, or home improvement

electronics.purpose: Narrow down the specific electronic product and provide recommendations
electronics.response_instructions: Ask about their budget, preferred brands, and must-have features. Provide 2-3 product recommendations.

transitions.description: Product preferences are clear enough to make recommendations

clothing.purpose: Understand style preferences and provide fashion recommendations
clothing.response_instructions: Ask about the occasion, preferred style, size, and any color preferences. Suggest options.

transitions.description: Clothing preferences are clear enough to make recommendations

home_garden.description: Help customer find home and garden products
home_garden.purpose: Identify specific home/garden needs and suggest products
home_garden.response_instructions: Ask what room or area they're shopping for. Discuss style preferences and budget. Recommend products.

transitions.description: Home/garden preferences are clear enough to make recommendations

recommendation.purpose: Provide final recommendation and close the conversation
recommendation.response_instructions: Summarize the customer's preferences and provide your top 2-3 product recommendations with brief explanations of why each is a good fit.
